description: Welcome to 'RIGA' – a well-maintained townhouse in central Richmond. Featuring 9’ ceilings, an open kitchen with granite counters, gas cooktop, and S/S appliances. Enjoy the cozy fireplace, designer color scheme, and crown moldings. Spacious bedrooms upstairs and a tandem double garage below. This quiet inside unit offers easy access to shopping, transit, and top schools like DeBeck Elementary and Palmer Secondary.
